News

Government Draft Planning Policy Risks Causing Irreparable Damage to Communities and Our Environment

Friday, 13 March, 2026
This week I submitted my response to the Government consultation on its revised national planning policy framework. It is incredibly concerning that the draft NPPF risks creating a developer's charter that could cause irreparable damage. The proposals have clearly been prepared as a means to enable huge levels of development in order to meet Government manifesto promises, but fail to recognise...
